item.title: *FED SAYS GOVERNOR STEPHEN MIRAN DISSENTS IN FAVOR OF RATE CUT

item.title:
FED SIGNALS MODEST RATE CUTS, STICKY INFLATION
Fed officials see rates at 3.4% in 2026 and ~3.1% longer term, with modest 25 bps cuts in 2026 and 2027. Inflation forecasts were revised higher (2.7%), while unemployment holds at 4.4% and growth edges up slightly.
item.description:
FED SIGNALS MODEST RATE CUTS, STICKY INFLATION

Fed officials see rates at 3.4% in 2026 and ~3.1% longer term, with modest 25 bps cuts in 2026 and 2027. Inflation forecasts were revised higher (2.7%), while unemployment holds at 4.4% and growth edges up slightly.

item.title: *FED MAINTAINS PROJECTIONS FOR ONE RATE CUT IN 2026, ONE IN 2027
item.description: *FED MAINTAINS PROJECTIONS FOR ONE RATE CUT IN 2026, ONE IN 2027

item.title:
U.S. GAS PRICES SURGE AS WAR DRIVES COSTS HIGHER
U.S. gas averages $3.84/gal, up 5 cents in a day and 86 cents since late February. Prices have jumped nationwide, with the sharpest spikes in Tennessee and Kentucky. West Coast states now exceed $5/gal, while diesel remains above $5 across the U.S.
item.description:
U.S. GAS PRICES SURGE AS WAR DRIVES COSTS HIGHER

U.S. gas averages $3.84/gal, up 5 cents in a day and 86 cents since late February. Prices have jumped nationwide, with the sharpest spikes in Tennessee and Kentucky. West Coast states now exceed $5/gal, while diesel remains above $5 across the U.S.

*Walter Bloomberg (@DeItaone)

MARKET BETS GAS PRICES NEAR $4.30 THIS MONTH

Prediction market data shows U.S. gas prices expected around $4.30 per gallon, up about $0.80 this month.
kalshi.com/markets/kxaaagasm…

— https://nitter.net/DeItaone/status/2034305753092141424#m

item.title:
IRAN CUTS GAS SUPPLIES TO IRAQ
Kpler’s Amena Bakr reports Iran has halted gas exports to Iraq, a key source for the country’s power generation.
item.description:
IRAN CUTS GAS SUPPLIES TO IRAQ

Kpler’s Amena Bakr reports Iran has halted gas exports to Iraq, a key source for the country’s power generation.

item.title:
TRUMP STRATEGY: DESTROY IRAN CAPABILITIES, END WAR FAST
U.S. aims to eliminate Iran’s missile, nuclear, and naval capabilities, then end the war, according to Axios citing a White House official. Regime change is seen as a bonus, not a goal, with less U.S. interest than Israel.
item.description:
TRUMP STRATEGY: DESTROY IRAN CAPABILITIES, END WAR FAST

U.S. aims to eliminate Iran’s missile, nuclear, and naval capabilities, then end the war, according to Axios citing a White House official. Regime change is seen as a bonus, not a goal, with less U.S. interest than Israel.
